overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a neon-lit underground nightclub. The player moves from narrow graffiti-covered corridors through a stairwell and into a large multi-level club with pink and cyan neon lighting, industrial architecture, and scattered NPC patrons.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow graffiti corridor with purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow corridor with purple neon lighting and graffiti murals

entered.detail: large wall mural featuring stylized skulls and figures in purple and pink tones
long fluorescent tubes emitting purple and pink light along the ceiling
concrete steps with illuminated edges leading upward

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a narrow enclosed corridor with vibrant purple graffiti art covering the walls. Neon tube lights provide the primary illumination, casting a cyberpunk atmosphere over the concrete surfaces.

events.description: lighting shifts from purple to teal/cyan as ego enters the stairwell area
ego begins ascending the concrete stairs toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs through a narrow corridor with teal patterned walls and industrial piping

notable_agents.action: character standing in a doorway with a pink neon sign, observing the corridor

entered.detail: walls covered in intricate teal and blue floral patterned wallpaper
fluorescent light strips emitting bright cyan light along the ceiling edges
exposed rusted pipes and conduits running along the left wall
pink neon sign shaped like a symbol above a doorway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a stairwell with teal patterned wallpaper and cyan neon lighting. The camera ascends the stairs, passing industrial pipes and a character standing in a neon-lit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkway of cyberpunk nightclub

events.description: exits narrow stairwell into the open upper level of a large nightclub

agents.ego_description: emerging onto the upper walkway of a neon-lit club, walking past seated patrons and round tables

notable_agents.action: group of three people sitting on a bench along the wall, conversing

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier with metal frame overlooking the lower club level
circular high-top table with bottles and glasses on the surface
continuous pink neon lighting strips embedded along the floor edges
network of exposed ventilation ducts and pipes on the high ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the stairwell into a spacious upper club level with pink neon floor lighting and industrial ceiling architecture. Patrons sit along the walls while the camera moves along a glass-railed walkway overlooking the main club floor below.

scene_state.functional_zone: club balcony overlooking central bar and dance floor

events.description: camera slows and pans to overlook the central bar area from the balcony railing

agents.ego_description: moving along the upper balcony, observing the club interior and looking down at the main bar area

notable_agents.action: patron leaning on the glass railing, looking down at the lower level

entered.detail: large circular bar structure on the lower level with pink neon trim and holographic displays
floating holographic text and symbols in green and pink above the bar
tall rectangular columns with bright pink neon lighting
metal and glass safety railing along the edge of the upper walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores the club's upper balcony level, revealing a large central bar with holographic signage and pink neon pillars below. The camera moves along the railing, showing the full scale of the multi-level nightclub interior with scattered patrons.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, graffiti-strewn corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched interior of a multi-level nightclub. It begins by gliding through a narrow enclosed passage where vibrant purple graffiti and neon tubes cast a moody glow over concrete walls. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a stairwell characterized by teal patterned wallpaper and cyan lighting, ascending past industrial pipes and a figure standing in a doorway. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges onto a spacious upper level, transitioning from the tight stairs to a glass-railed walkway illuminated by pink neon floor lights and industrial ceiling architecture. Finally, the perspective expands across the upper balcony to reveal the full scale of the club, overlooking a large central bar with holographic signage and pink neon pillars below.
